checks.name: production_build
checks.detail: Compiled successfully; type check valid; 15 routes emitted (1 static /, dynamic release/queue/settings/api).

checks.name: db_persistence
checks.detail: data/release-gate.db present with ~3.1MB WAL of real writes (node:sqlite). 9 tables created by src/lib/db.ts.

checks.name: reseed_api
checks.detail: Re-seeds synthetic fixtures (12 records, 2 releases) via src/lib/seed.ts.

checks.name: provider_status_api
checks.detail: configured=true, host=api.stepfun.com, model=step-3.7-flash, source=process.env (no secret leaked).

checks.name: page_smoke_http
checks.note: 307s are intentional redirects (root -> sample release, /release/sample -> REL-SAMPLE-01).

checks.name: live_agent_smoke
checks.detail: 2 live runs; 11/11 assertions pass. A: wrong_code/BAD-X999 -> 隔离 (7681ms). B: access_denied -> 需审批 (14257ms). Both source=live-provider. Distinct plan/tools/state/hash.

checks.name: degraded_recover
checks.detail: status=degraded, result_state=检查失败, zero tools/issues emitted; recover phase logged. No false success.

checks.name: browser_smoke_screenshots
checks.command: npm run shots (Playwright chromium, real clicks)
checks.detail: 10 screenshots captured by driving the live hero flow (mutation chip -> 通行检查 -> result) on desktop 1440x900 and iPhone 13.

checks.name: g4_live_mutation_matrix
checks.note: 3 distinct result states across the 4 hero chips, all via live provider. See .hunter/g4-traceability.json.
